query:
SELECT
            s.user_id         AS "user_id!: String",
            s.left_at         AS "left_at!: String",
            s.departure_type,
            m.account_username,
            m.display_name,
            m.server_nickname
        FROM stays s
        JOIN members m ON m.guild_id = s.guild_id AND m.user_id = s.user_id
        WHERE s.guild_id = ? AND s.left_at IS NOT NULL
          AND (? IS NULL OR s.left_at >= ?)
        ORDER BY s.id DESC
